Procedures 1755 Num 8 
ALL_OTH_SVCS_ADJ_SA_ALL PCC for all benes for All Other Services Not Otherwise Classified Specialty-adjusted and risk-adjusted per capita costs for all attributed beneficiaries for All Other Services Not Otherwise Classified, All Other Services category 1756 Num 8 
ALL_HOSP_PHYSOFF_TOT_DIA Num of benes with diabetes with Outpatient EM Services, Procedures, and Therapy (excluding emergency department) Number of attributed beneficiaries with diabetes with Outpatient EM
